How Do I Get Funded After Passing an Evaluation?
Passing an evaluation

April 2, 2026

Table of contents

Once you meet your profit target and pass the Evaluation, you will need to wait until the end of the trading day at 5:00 p.m. EST/EDT.

Our system runs its reconciliation between 5:00 p.m. and 8:00 p.m EST/EDT, and you will be notified of your success once the process is complete.

You can then navigate to your dashboard and activate your Simulated Funded account.

Funded Account Starting Balance

Your funded account starts at your base account size ($50K, $100K, or $150K) regardless of your evaluation ending balance.

Important: Profits earned during evaluation do NOT carry over to your funded account.

Example: If you end your evaluation at $53,200, your funded account will still start at $50,000 (your base account size).

Activation Fees

Activation fees vary by account type:

- Growth: No activation fee

- Select: No activation fee

- Lightning: One-time purchase, no activation fee
